info.title: Navixy Backend API
info.description: OpenAPI specification for the Navixy Backend API. Covers all resources and endpoints from the Backend API (base path /v2). Authentication is via session hash (API key) in the request header only; do not send hash in the body. Rate limit: 50 req/s per user and per IP. Responses: success with value/list/result or error with status code and description.

post.description: Gets user's trackers with optional filtering by labels.
Marks tracker as deleted and corrupt its source, device_id and phone.
Deletes a tracker if it is a clone. Will not work if specified ID is the original tracker.
Changes tracker's phone and sets up new APN.
Gets last CAN and OBD sensors and states values received from the device.
Gets current fuel level (in liters) of tracker's fuel tanks.
Gets current state of tracker's digital inputs and semantic inputs (ignition, buttons, car alarms, etc.).
Gets current state of trackers' digital inputs and semantic inputs for multiple trackers.
Gets trackers' outputs info for multiple trackers.
Gets last GPS point of the tracker. Points located by GSM LBS are excluded.
Gets last sensor values for sensors that are configured for the tracker.
Gets current tracker state (GPS, GSM, outputs, etc.).
Gets current states (GPS, GSM, outputs, etc.) for several trackers.
Gets all integrated tracker models from the models table.
Sets tags for a tracker. Tags must already be created.
Requests current position from the device. The device must support the requesting function.
Registers a new tracker device and links it with the current API user account.
Resends registration commands to the device. Requires SMS gateway.
Registers a new tracker using only IMEI. No automatic SMS commands are sent.
Replaces the device without losing its history and some settings.
Replaces a device using only IMEI. No automatic SMS commands are sent.
Resends registration commands to the new device. Requires SMS gateway.
Sends a command to the tracker for special control (determined by tracker model).
Sends a GPRS command to the device, processed in a protocol-dependent manner.
Replaces the calibration data for a sensor.
Replaces the calibration data for a sensor from Omnicomm LLS monitor's XML configuration file. If XML file contains information about multiple sensors, user must specify which sensor number to use.
Convert batch of tab-delimited circle geofences and return list of checked geofences with errors.
Deletes user's geofence by zone_id or array of zone_ids.
Gets all geofence IDs and names that contain the specified coordinates.
Updates geofence parameters for the specified geofence.
Imports geofences from a KML file.
Downloads geofences as a KML file.
This method retrieves a list of tracks for a given tracker within a specified time period.

This method fetches all track points that a GPS tracker has recorded and sent to the platform within a specified time\ frame. The timestamp for each point corresponds to when the tracker recorded the point, adjusted to the user's time zone.
Downloads a waybill report DOCX file for tracks of the specified tracker and time period.
Gets route points using Google Directions API.
Gets route points via OSRM API.
Gets route points using Progorod router.
List asset groups by ids or asset.
List of beacon data history between `from` date/time and `to` date/time sorted by **get\_time** field.
Performs a forward geocoding. Returns a list of locations matching the given address. Items in the list sorted by relevance.
Search address by location using geocoder.
Reads the body of the specified layer.
Returns metadata for all map layers for the user.
Updates metadata for the specified map layer.
Deletes a vehicles with the specified IDs. Only one of the following parameters must be specified.
Gets all vehicles belonging to user.
Convert batch of tab-delimited vehicles and return list of checked vehicles with errors.
Creates a new vehicle service work. For vehicles with associated tracker only.
List all service works of all user vehicles.
Gets service work info by its id.
Updates task status, and saved (on `done` **status**) current date and values of used (in condition) counters for "freeze" wearing percent.
Updates information fields and notification settings of vehicle service work.

Gets driver journal entries.\ There are two ways to get entries: by their IDs or by specifying date range.\ If there are no `entry_ids` in request, entries will be selected by intersecting their date range with date range from request (`from` and `to` parameters).
Updates driver journal entry. Only two fields `type` and `comment` are available to update.
Gets driver journal entries. Entries selected by intersecting their date range with date range from request (`from` and `to` parameters).
Gets form associated with the specified task.
Gets all POI IDs and names within which a specified coordinates are located inside.
Deletes POI with the specified ID.
Converts batch of tab-delimited POIs and return list of checked POIs with errors.
Downloads form as a file by an ID.
Gets all form templates belonging to current master user.
Gets form template belonging to current master user by specified ID.
Get check-in which ID is equal to `checkin_id`.
Gets marker entries on a map for trackers and for the specified time interval.
Deletes check-ins with the specified IDs.
Creates a new check-in. Needed for exceptional cases.
Creates an image for check-in. If you have multiple files to upload, be sure to add a brief delay between uploading each one to ensure a smooth process.
Creates a new form that can be attached to a check-in. Form always created on the basis of form template.
Creates a new file entry associated with form's field. If you have multiple files to upload, be sure to add a brief delay between uploading each one to ensure a smooth process.
Activates previously registered user with the provided session hash\ (it is contained in activation link from email sent to user).\ Available only to master users.
Tries to authenticate the user and get hash.
Gets user information and some settings.
Destroys current user session.\ Works only with standard user session (not with API key).
Sends a new activation link to user.
Changes password of user with the provided session hash (it is contained in a password restore link from email sent to user by user/restore\_password).
Changes password for login user.\ Works only with standard user session (not with API key).
Updates current user's file storage settings.
Prolongs current user session.\ Works only with standard user session (not with API key).
Binds Push token with a current session.
Deletes push token bound with the session.

This action occurs when a customer opens the UI or activates the UI tab in the browser after it hasn't been used for more than 2 hours.\ Works only with standard user session (not with API key).\ This action type may be in the [user audit log](audit_log.md#list).
Deletes sub-user. This operation cannot be reversed.
List all sub-users belonging to current user.
Allows you to create sub-users associated to your master account.
Gives access for sub-user to specified geofences.
Disables access for sub-user to specified geofences.
Gets a list of geofence IDs to which this sub-user has access.
Gets a list of geofences to which this sub-user has access.
Gives access for sub-user to the specified trackers.
Gets a list of tracker IDs to which this sub-user has access.
Disables access for sub-user to the specified trackers.
Deletes tag with the specified ID.
Gets all tags belonging to user with optional filtering.
Search entities that bound with all of specified tags.
Get list of entities which are available for customization.
Gets a set of custom fields associated with the specified entity. Note that you must know the entity ID, which can be obtained from [entity/list](index.md#list).
Updates a set of custom fields associated with the specified entity.
Lists less than or equal to `limit` of tracker events filtered by event types (`events`) between `from` date/time and `to` date/time sorted by **time** field.
Lists user's events (history) filtered by date range and optional event types. Documented in history-user.md.
Returns available history event types with localized descriptions.

List less than or equal to `limit` of the latest user's unread history events. Described how it works in our [guide](../../../guides/rules-notifications/work-with-notifications.md#all-unread-events-of-a-user).
Get count of user's unread history messages starting `from` date.
Creates a new report schedule entry.
Deletes report schedule with the specified ID.
Get all report schedules belonging to user.

Get all plugins available to the user. List of available plugins may vary from user to user depending on platform settings and purchased features. Only these plugins can be used to register trackers, generate reports, etc.
Creates a new bill for the user.
Shows list of bills with their parameters in array.

Gets list of device's plans available to user. If user's dealer is **default dealer** or **paas** then listed tariffs of that dealer, else listed plans of parent dealer.\ Listed only plans available for user's legal type.
Gets all of API keys for an account.
The report for health-check. It will do nothing.
Sends email from the platform to any email address with specified title and text. Needs ROOT access level.
Gets dealer info and dealer-specific UI settings by a domain or hash.

Gets proposal trips that could be used for driver journal entry creation.\ Proposal objects created by a track's division by driver changes.\ If there was no driver change on the track, then the track will be returned entirely.\ Tracks selected by intersecting their date range with date range from request (`from` and `to` parameters).
Assign `icon_id` (from standard icon set) to this employee/driver.\ The `icon_id` can be `null` – this means that uploaded avatar should be used instead of icon.
Gets entity by the ID or by type.
Updates settings of customizable entity. Entity must have a valid ID.
Sends an email with user's feedback, ask for help, or suggestion a new feature. The message will be sent to dealer's\ email address for feedback.
Deletes a depot with the specified ID.
Gets all depots belonging to user.
Updates existing depot with the specified ID.
Marks history entry as read by `id` (see: [Tracker history entry](index.md#tracker-history-entry)).
Marks all the user's history entries read.
Returns history entry with the specified ID.
Returns the estimate of the monthly payment amount
Returns list of payment systems available for specified user.
Deletes a report from the database.
Retrieve generated report as a file.
Requests a report generation with the specified parameters.
Returns info about all available generated or in-progress reports.
Retrieves a generated report as JSON.
Returns a report generation status for the specified report id.
Updates retranslator parameters for the specified retranslator. Note that retranslator must exist, and must belong to\ the current user.
Gets route points via specified route provider.
Gives access for sub-user to specified places.
Gets a list of places to which this sub-user has access.
Gets a list of place IDs to which this sub-user has access.
Disables access for a sub-user to specified places.
Assigns (removes) a security group to sub-users.
Deletes existing security group.\ All sub-users belonging to this group will be assigned to default (null) security group.
List all security groups belonging to current user.
Creates a new session for the specified sub-user and obtain its hash. Can be used to log in to sub-user's accounts.
Assigns icon\_id (from standard icon set) to specified tag.
Changes plan of tracker (with `tracker_id`) to new plan (with `tariff_id`).
List plans on which user can switch the passed tracker (even when tariff last changed less or equal than **tariff.freeze.period** time ago).
Attaches new form to the existing task or checkpoint. Form always created on the basis of form template.
Deletes a form (detach it from the task).

Returns descriptions of forms, created on the basis of specified form template. In addition to the data on the forms, the list contains data on the objects related to each form – tracker / vehicle / employee, task.
Updates existing form values of given task.

The suggested order for the given route points will correspond to the time windows (from and to) of each point. Points with earlier time windows will have lower ordinal numbers. If time windows overlap, the order of such points may vary to maximize the overall efficiency of the route. The maximum distance per route optimization is 5000 kilometers. When using APIs, the maximum number of points...
Deletes a checkpoint from route and reorder others.\ If route has two checkpoints then use transmute on the other checkpoint, because route must have\ at least two checkpoints.
Transmutes a checkpoint to task and delete its route and other checkpoints in the route.
Information about all supported timezones for the specified locale. Does not require user authorization.
This method allows you to download track points as a KML/KMZ file which can be used in other apps to show tracks.
This method fetches IDs of zones and places that contain at least one track point.
Gets number of commands in queue for the specified tracker.
Removes all pending SMS commands from the queue for the specified tracker.
Deletes a Geo Link with the specified ID. Error 201 if the link does not exist or does not belong to the current user.

Returns a list of the user's Geo Links. Optional filter (string), conditions (search conditions array), offset (default 0), limit (default 10000), sort (e.g. ["creator=asc", "id=desc"]). Condition fields: trackers, aliases, creator, description. Sort fields: id, create_date, expire_date, trackers, aliases, status, creator, description. Default sort: id=asc.
Returns a Geo Link with the specified ID. Error 201 if not found or not owned by the current user.
Activates or deactivates a Geo Link. Set is_active to false to deactivate. Error 201 if the link does not exist or does not belong to the current user.
Gets list of user's billing transactions for the specified period.
Gets list of audit records available for current user.
Resends an authentication code for multi-factor authentication to the email specified at the registration.\ This action has a special rate-limit in 5 minutes to avoid abuse.
Verifies given authentication code as a part in multi-factor authentication.\ On successful verification, you'll receive a normal session hash.
Creates new user delivery session.\ In demo session allowed to create a new session only if it not already exists.
Returns current user delivery session key.
Assigns `icon_id` (from standard icon set) to specified vehicle.
Gets all of user's vehicle statuses.
Get points of user's geofence by zone_id.
Update points for user's geofence by zone_id.
Count the total and unread number of asset events.
Lists less than or equal to `limit` of assets' events sorted by the `time` field.

get.description: Lists all existing user applications. Source: reference/user-applications.json

post.description: Creates a new application. Source: reference/user-applications.json
Updates an existing application. Source: reference/user-applications.json

post.summary: Deletes a user application by id
post.description: Deletes a specified application by its unique identifier. Source: reference/user-applications.json

post.summary: Toggles user application visibility in the side menu
post.description: Toggles application visibility in the side menu. Source: reference/user-applications.json

Creates a new Geo Link. Up to 10000 geo-links per user account. Required sub-user rights: weblocator_session_create. Errors: 13 (insufficient rights), 204 (zone/place not found), 217 (nonexistent tracker), 236 (tariff: weblocator unavailable), 268 (quota exceeded).

Updates an existing Geo Link. Required sub-user rights: weblocator_session_create. Errors: 13 (insufficient rights), 201 (link not found), 204 (zone/place not found), 217 (nonexistent tracker), 236 (tariff: weblocator unavailable).

HashAuth.name: Authorization
HashAuth.description: Session hash (API key). Send in the request header only: Authorization: NVX {hash}. Do not send hash in the request body.

ZoneBounds.description: North-west and south-east coordinates of the axis-aligned minimum bounding box

ZonePoint.description: Geofence point (latitude, longitude, optional route node flag)

node.description: True if this point is a route node

model.description: Tracker model name from models table

blocked.description: True if tracker blocked due to tariff end

tariff_id.description: ID of tracker tariff from main_tariffs table

status_listing_id.description: ID of the status listing associated with this tracker, or null

tariff_end_date.description: Date of next tariff prolongation, or null

phone.description: Phone of the device. Can be null or empty if device has no GSM module

tag_id.description: ID of tag. Must be unique for a tracker

ordinal.description: Ordinal or kind of tag. Must be unique for a tracker. Max value is 5

clone.description: True if this tracker is a clone

group_id.description: Tracker group ID, 0 when no group

avatar_file_name.description: Avatar file name. Omitted if not present

tag_bindings.description: List of attached tags. Appears only for tracker/list

TrackerOutputInfo.description: Tracker output number and user-defined name

color.description: Geofence color in 3-byte RGB hex format
Geofence color in 3-byte RGB hex format

ZoneSausage.description: Sausage geofence (points within radius of a polyline)

color.description: Geofence color in 3-byte RGB hex format

TrackerValueResponse.description: Success response with a single tracker

TrackerListResponse.description: Success response with list of trackers

ZoneValueResponse.description: Success response with a single zone (circle, polygon, or sausage)

ZoneListResponse.description: Success response with list of zones

LocationLinkLifetime.description: Start and end of the Geo Link session.

LocationLinkDisplayOptions.description: Display options for the Geo Link map.

map.description: Map type: roadmap, satellite, hybrid, or other.

LocationLinkParams.description: Link parameters: bounding zones, places, display options.

bounding_mode.description: Bounding mode; optional when no bounding zones.

LocationLinkTrackerEntry.description: Tracker entry in a Geo Link: alias and object_data to show.

object_data.description: Fields to show: speed, address, movement_status, connection_status, driver_name, driver_phone, vehicle_label, vehicle_reg_number

LocationLinkCreateRequest.description: Request body for creating a Geo Link.

description.description: Link description. Printable characters, max length 255.

trackers.description: List of tracker IDs with parameters. Length 1 to 100.

LocationLinkUpdateRequest.description: Request body for updating a Geo Link.

description.description: Link description. Printable characters, max length 255.

trackers.description: List of tracker IDs with parameters. Length 1 to 100.

LocationLinkReadRequest.description: Request body for reading a Geo Link by ID.

LocationLinkListRequest.description: Request body for listing Geo Links. Optional filter, conditions, offset, limit, sort.

filter.description: Optional filter for all fields. If used with conditions, both must match.

conditions.description: Search conditions. See Search conditions in Backend API docs. Fields: trackers, aliases, creator, description.

sort.description: Sort options, e.g. ["creator=asc", "id=desc"]. Fields: id, create_date, expire_date, trackers, aliases, status, creator, description.

LocationLinkDeleteRequest.description: Request body for deleting a Geo Link.

LocationLinkStatusChangeRequest.description: Request body for activating or deactivating a Geo Link.

is_active.description: If false, the link is deactivated.

RequestBodyBase.description: Endpoint-specific parameters. See operation schema and Backend API docs per path.

exclusion.description: If true, values lists models NOT supported

sum.description: Bill sum in default currency of the panel

hash.description: Hash of the API key (32 chars)

color.description: Tag color in 3-byte RGB hex format

id.description: Unique identifier of the working status

show_till.description: Date until notification should be shown

User.description: User object (simplified; full structure in docs)

ZoneBatchConvertErrors.description: Zone batch convert response with errors

Value.description: Form field value (field-type-specific; type and value or type-specific fields)

TagListResponse.description: Success response with list of tags

VehicleValueResponse.description: Success response with a single vehicle

VehicleListResponse.description: Success response with list of vehicles
